calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; Elder Financial Abuse; Fraud And Concealment; For An Order Determining Ownership Of Real Prop
Off Calendar Dec-02-2011 Text Ruling

Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; Elder Financial Abuse; Fraud And Concealment; For An Order Determining Ownership Of Real Prop
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Continued To Dec-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amir Rang for Constantine Konstin (Trustor). Sheila Robello for John Konstin (Trustee). Daniel Murphy for Ann Konstin and Sydna Konstin.

The Petition to Remove Trustee for Breach of Fiduciary Duty, etc. was continued to December 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the purpose of completing discovery. The Court strongly encouraged the Parties to consider/talk about engaging in mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; Elder Financial Abuse; Fraud And Concealment; For An Order Determining Ownership Of Real Prop
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Continued To Sep-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amir Atashi for Constantine "Gus" Konstin. Sheila Robello for John Knostin (Trustee). Daniel Murphy and Lynn Searle for and with Ann Konstin and Sydna Konstin.

The Court stated that it received an outline of the disputed issues, that the matter will be consolidated with the earlier case number and that Mr. Murphy is to prepare two orders consolidated the actions. Mr. Murphy stated that discovery has begun, that he has offered mediation and that it was his position that the Trust should cover costs of mediation. Mr. Murphy and Ms. Searle referred to John Konstin's response, expressed concerns about admissions of breach, the Trustee holding title of property he does not own, raised the issue of eviction of one of their Clients and stated that their Client's are concerned about the safety of their Father. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. was continued to September 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and readiness of an evidentiary hearing. Judge Wiss suggested having more informal resolution of discovery issues and stated that she would make herself available to the Parties.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; Elder Financial Abuse; Fraud And Concealment; For An Order Determining Ownership Of Real Prop
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Continued To Jun-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition (1) To Suspend Trustee'S Powers, (2) To Appoint A Temporary Trustee, And (3) To Direct Surrender Of The Trust Estate To The Temporary Trustee
Off Calendar May-20-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for John Konstin. Daniel Murphy and Lynn Searle for and with Ann Konstin and Sydna Konstin (Daughters). Amir Atashi Rang for Constantine Konstin (Trustor/Sole Current Trustee) also known as Gus Konstin. John Konstin, Jr. (Grandson of Settlor), Sydna Konstin (Grandaughter), Laura Konstin (Grandaughter) and Glenda Gutierrez (Family Friend) also present.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court denied Mr. Murphy's request for an evidentiary hearing on the ex parte petition and denied the Ex Parte Petition to Suspend Trustee's Powers. etc. The Court encouraged the Parties to outline the issues that are in dispute and try and tackle them between now and June 14, 2011 (hearing date on underlying petition).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos.
